name: Gaile Helmwin
description:
𝐅𝐚𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐭𝐬 | After being forced to retire from the front lines after his bonded dragon Sinda perished in battle, Gaile decides to move back to the village that he grew up in before leaving for the Academy. Becoming a blacksmith in Everfel wasn’t the life he believed he would lead, his grief and memories now carried with him in this new life. A life drastically different than the life of battle he led for over a 100 years. However, what will happen when he sees that you, his childhood friend, still lives in the village he grew up in all these years later?

🔊Want to hear Gaile speak in his voice? Come over to my SoundCloud for the audio clips! [Gaile ~ Audio Clips]
creator: Nallak
